requirementCueLines: [Page 1] Changers must complete by time of application (April 5).

[Page 1] ENGRUD Students: Plan to complete all CEE prerequisite human systems and develop innovative solutions to address
[Page 1] courses (application and enrollment requirements) before environmental challenges.

[Page 1] Statistics (INDE 315, Q SCI 381, STAT 390 or STAT 290) 3-4cr

[Page 1] ● BSENVE students are required to complete 13 credits of
[Page 1] Engineering and Science Elective coursework. See the
[Page 1] BSENVE E&S Elective list for complete details.
[Page 1] Economics (4-5 credits) CEE Topic Requirement 4-5cr Additional credits to meet the 180 total required for the BSENVE
[Page 1] *ECON/ESRM/ENVIR courses may also be applied to SSc req. Academic Planning Notes:
